title: Simple Nightstand with Drawer
summary: We designed this nightstand/bedside table to be traditional in style to match my mom’s decor.
description: We designed this nightstand/bedside table to be traditional in style to match my mom’s decor. She requested a drawer – which I had never built before. However, I was shocked at how easy it was to build and install the drawer. Don’t let that intimidate you!

steps.title: Make Cuts and Drill Holes
steps.body: Make all cuts necessary, then add appropriate pocket holes.

steps.title: Build Base
steps.body: Attach the shelf boards together, then attach to the legs, creating your base.

steps.title: Build Drawer Box
steps.body: Assemble the drawer box and the drawer. Add drawer slides with Kreg drawer slide jig or according to product instructions.

steps.title: Construct and Attach Top
steps.body: Attach the boards for your top together with Kreg screws and then glue on top of drawer box. Add a front to your drawer.

steps.title: Get Full Tutorial
steps.body: Get the full tutorial with exact steps and cuts at https://www.charlestoncrafted.com/diy-nightstand-with-drawer/
